title: Implement plugin protocol types and methods
description: Add PushResponse, SyncReport types to plugin.rs. Implement auth_check, modify push/sync to parse stdout, add apply_push_response

notes.author: mark
notes.text: All protocol types implemented: PushResponse, SyncReport, SyncCreate, SyncUpdate, SyncDelete. auth_check, push (with stdout parsing), sync (with stdin/stdout) all working.
